content.rationale: The cedent's crisis management protocol and rerouting plans reduce but do not eliminate tail risk from a Taiwan Strait closure. The 1-in-50 OEP of $95M and 1-in-100 OEP of $130M indicate significant exposure. Setting retention at $50M covers frequent smaller losses while ceding the tail. Premium at 1.5x the AEP of $6.5M reflects the elevated risk and recent loss ratio of 0.75, ensuring adequate margin.
